author: SegmentLinking
body:
### PR description

As per title, for offline tracking - to mimic what's done at HLT: this PR enables the pass-through option into the MultiTrackSelector, when `seedingLST` and `trackingLST` procModifiers are used.

### PR validation

This PR can be tested, e.g., with workflow 29834.711, that is using the `trackingLST` procModifier in an offline tracking-only workflow.
title: Adding pass-through option to MultiTrackSelector (for LST tracking / seeding)
